title: Search for an existing patient and add them to the receptionist queue via Quick Actions
description: Verifies receptionist can search patients, select a result, use a Quick Action, and see the patient in the queue.

steps.description: Type "Test Patient A" (or its patient ID) into the patient search input
Click on a patient in the search results list
Click a "Quick Action" button for the selected patient that adds or sends the patient to the queue
Verify text "Test Patient A" is visible in the receptionist queue

title: Search using QR input text and view matching patient results
description: Verifies receptionist can search using QR input text and see matching results to select.

steps.description: Wait until any loading spinner disappears before interacting with intake UI
Type a QR-like code value into the patient search input
Verify the search results section is visible
Click on a patient in the search results list
Verify the selected patient details panel (or selected patient section) is visible

title: Register a new patient with mandatory fields and confirm they appear in queue
description: Verifies receptionist can open registration modal, submit a valid form, and see the new patient appear in the queue.

steps.description: Click the button to open the patient registration modal
Verify text "Register" is visible in the modal header
Type "Test Patient" into the Name field
Click the "Submit" or "Register" button in the modal
Verify text "Test Patient" is visible in the receptionist queue

title: Registration validation: missing Name prevents submission and keeps modal open
description: Verifies registration modal blocks submission when Name is empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the button to open the patient registration modal
Verify text "Register" is visible in the modal header
Click the "Submit" or "Register" button in the modal
Verify a validation message indicating Name is required is visible
Verify the registration modal is still visible

title: Registration validation: missing Age prevents submission and keeps modal open
description: Verifies registration modal blocks submission when Age is empty and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the button to open the patient registration modal
Verify text "Register" is visible in the modal header
Type "Age Missing" into the Name field
Click the "Submit" or "Register" button in the modal
Verify a validation message indicating Age is required is visible
Verify the registration modal is still visible

title: Search with no matches shows an empty state message
description: Verifies searching for a non-existent patient shows a visible 'no results' state rather than stale results.

steps.description: Type "NonExistentPatient_999999" into the patient search input
Verify text "No results" or "No patients found" is visible
Verify the search results list is not visible

title: Queue update persists after selecting a different patient
description: Verifies adding a patient to the queue remains visible even after selecting another patient from search results.

steps.description: Type a patient name or patient ID into the patient search input
Click on a patient in the search results list
Click a "Quick Action" button for the selected patient that adds or sends the patient to the queue
Verify the selected patient name is visible in the receptionist queue
Click on a different patient in the search results list
Verify the originally queued patient name is still visible in the receptionist queue

title: Register a patient successfully with required fields (Name and Age)
description: Verifies a receptionist can register a new patient when mandatory fields are provided and sees success feedback and the patient in the queue.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Type "Test Patient A" into the Name field
Verify text "Test Patient A" is visible

title: Validation blocks submission when Name is empty
description: Verifies the registration form shows a field-level error and does not submit when Name is missing.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Verify text "Name is required" (or "Please enter name") is visible

title: Validation blocks submission when Age is empty
description: Verifies the registration form shows a field-level error and does not submit when Age is missing.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Type "Test Patient B" into the Name field
Verify text "Age is required" (or "Please enter age") is visible

title: Validation triggers when both Name and Age are empty
description: Verifies multiple required-field errors appear and submission is blocked when both mandatory fields are missing.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Verify text "Name is required" (or "Please enter name") is visible
Verify text "Age is required" (or "Please enter age") is visible

title: Age field rejects non-numeric input
description: Verifies the Age field prevents or flags non-numeric values and blocks submission.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Type "Test Patient C" into the Name field
Verify text "Enter a valid age" (or "Age must be a number") is visible

title: Age field rejects zero or negative values
description: Verifies the registration form blocks unrealistic age values such as 0 or negative numbers.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Type "Test Patient D" into the Name field
Verify text "Enter a valid age" (or "Age must be greater than 0") is visible

title: Successful registration with optional fields filled does not break validation
description: Verifies optional fields can be filled and submission still succeeds when required fields are valid.

steps.description: Click the "Register Patient" (or "New Patient") button to open the registration modal
Verify text "Patient Registration" (or "Register Patient") is visible
Type "Test Patient E" into the Name field
Type "5551234567" into an optional Phone field (if present)
Type "Notes for testing" into an optional Notes field (if present)
Verify text "Test Patient E" is visible

title: Submit vitals successfully with valid BP, temperature, and heart rate
description: Verifies an intake nurse can select a visit, enter valid vitals, submit, and see a confirmation toast.

steps.description: Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field
Type "75" into the heart rate field

title: BP validation error when missing '/' then successful submit after correction
description: Verifies blood pressure format validation blocks submission until corrected to systolic/diastolic with '/'.

steps.description: Type "12080" into the blood pressure field
Type "75" into the heart rate field
Verify text "Blood pressure must include '/' and be in format like 120/80" is visible
Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field

title: Temperature validation error for below range then successful submit after correction
description: Verifies temperature must be within 35 to 42 and shows an error when below range.

steps.description: Wait until any loading spinner disappears before interacting with intake UI
Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field
Type "75" into the heart rate field
Verify text "Temperature must be between 35°C and 42°C" is visible

title: Temperature validation error for above range then successful submit after correction
description: Verifies temperature must be within 35 to 42 and shows an error when above range.

steps.description: Wait until any loading spinner disappears before interacting with intake UI
Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field
Type "75" into the heart rate field
Verify text "Temperature must be between 35°C and 42°C" is visible

title: BP validation: missing diastolic value then successful submit after correction
description: Verifies blood pressure field rejects incomplete systolic/diastolic input and allows submission after fixing.

steps.description: Type "120/" into the blood pressure field
Type "75" into the heart rate field
Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field

title: BP validation: extra separators (e.g., multiple '/') then successful submit after correction
description: Verifies blood pressure field rejects malformed values with multiple separators and allows submission after correction.

steps.description: Type "120//80" into the blood pressure field
Type "75" into the heart rate field
Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field

title: Heart rate validation error (non-numeric) then successful submit after correction
description: Verifies heart rate field rejects non-numeric input and allows submission once corrected.

steps.description: Type "120/80" into the blood pressure field
Type "abc" into the heart rate field
Type "75" into the heart rate field

title: End-to-end intake page loads and allows selecting a patient visit
description: Verifies the intake page renders after login and a visit can be selected before entering vitals.

steps.description: Verify element "Selected visit details" is visible

title: Enable downstream actions after completing Intake (happy path)
description: Verifies that completing Intake for a visit results in an 'Intake completed' status and downstream Pharmacy/X-ray actions become enabled for that visit.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button

title: Attempt downstream action on a visit without completed Intake shows blocked state/message
description: Verifies that for a visit without completed Intake, Pharmacy/X-ray action cannot be opened and shows a disabled state, toast, or access-blocked page.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button

title: Reception view reflects Intake completion status for a visit
description: Verifies that the Reception dashboard shows a clear 'Intake completed' indicator for a visit after Intake is completed.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Verify page title contains "Reception" or Verify text "Reception" is visible

title: Intake page shows completion confirmation after vitals submission
description: Verifies that the Intake workflow provides a visible confirmation or status indicating Intake is completed after submitting vitals.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Verify page title contains "Intake" or Verify text "Intake" is visible

title: Blocked downstream access does not navigate away from current page when action is disabled
description: Verifies that attempting a gated Pharmacy/X-ray action for an incomplete Intake visit does not allow navigation and keeps the user on the current page while showing a disabled state or message.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button

title: Gating remains enforced after page refresh/navigation to Intake for an incomplete visit
description: Verifies that an incomplete Intake visit remains gated (Pharmacy/X-ray actions still blocked) after leaving and returning to the workflow pages.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button

title: Accountant can view invoices, review receipt details, print, and confirm payment to discharge visit
description: Verifies the primary accountant workflow from invoice selection through printing and confirming payment with visible success state.

steps.description: Verify unauthorized access is safely blocked: accept any of (URL redirected to "/reception", visible "Access Denied", visible "403", or visible "Unauthorized") as PASS
Confirm payment and discharge completed visit

title: Accountant sees invoice list and it refreshes without breaking the page
description: Verifies the invoices list is visible and remains stable across an auto-refresh interval.

title: Selecting an invoice shows service items and totals in the receipt panel
description: Verifies that selecting an invoice reveals receipt details including items and totals.

steps.description: Verify element "service items list" is visible

title: Confirm payment shows visible success confirmation and reflects discharged status
description: Verifies successful payment confirmation shows a visible success message and indicates the visit is discharged/paid.

steps.description: Confirm payment and discharge completed visit

title: Role forbidden: Receptionist cannot access Accountant page and sees an access-blocking message
description: Verifies that a user without accountant permissions cannot access the accountant dashboard and sees a toast or 403 page.

title: Confirm payment error shows error toast and user remains on invoice receipt panel
description: Verifies that when payment confirmation fails, an error toast appears and the selected invoice context remains visible.

steps.description: Confirm payment and discharge completed visit

title: Receipt panel is not shown before selecting any invoice
description: Verifies the page does not display invoice-specific receipt details until an invoice is selected.

steps.description: Verify text "Select an invoice" is visible

title: Search archived bills and open an invoice details modal from a grouped day section
description: Verifies archived bills can be searched, grouped by day, expanded, and an invoice details modal can be opened and reviewed.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Archive" navigation link or menu item
Type "a" into the global search field
Verify element "Grouped day section" is visible
Click to expand a grouped day section
Click on an archived invoice row/item to open details
Verify element "Invoice details" modal is visible

title: Search with a specific query and verify results update under grouped day sections
description: Verifies the global search filters archived bills and results remain organized by grouped day sections.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Archive" navigation link or menu item
Type "INV" into the global search field
Verify element "Grouped day section" is visible
Click to expand a grouped day section
Verify element "Archived invoice" list item is visible

title: Clear the global search and verify grouped day sections return to the default view
description: Verifies clearing the search restores the broader grouped day sections view on the archive page.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Archive" navigation link or menu item
Type "test" into the global search field
Verify element "Grouped day section" is visible
Click the global search field clear control (such as an "X" icon) or delete the entered text
Verify element "Grouped day section" is visible

title: Expand and collapse a grouped day section in archive results
description: Verifies grouped day sections can be expanded to show invoices and collapsed back.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Archive" navigation link or menu item
Verify element "Grouped day section" is visible
Click to expand a grouped day section
Verify element "Archived invoice" list item is visible
Click the same grouped day section header to collapse it
Verify element "Archived invoice" list item is not visible

title: Open invoice details modal and verify key invoice data is visible
description: Verifies the invoice details modal shows readable invoice information after opening from the archive list.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Archive" navigation link or menu item
Click to expand a grouped day section
Click on an archived invoice row/item to open details
Verify element "Invoice details" modal is visible

title: Close the invoice details modal and return to the archive list
description: Verifies the invoice details modal can be dismissed and the archive list remains visible.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click the "Archive" navigation link or menu item
Click to expand a grouped day section
Click on an archived invoice row/item to open details
Verify element "Invoice details" modal is visible
Click the modal close button (such as "Close" or an "X")
Verify element "Invoice details" modal is not visible
Verify element "Grouped day section" is visible

title: Unauthorized access attempt to Accountant Archive shows 403 page or toast message
description: Verifies a user without required authentication/role cannot access the archive page and receives an error indicator.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Verify unauthorized access is safely blocked: accept any of (visible "403", visible "Unauthorized", visible "Access Denied", or redirect away from accountant routes) as PASS

title: Authenticated Receptionist is prevented from accessing Accountant-only page
description: Verifies role-based access control by logging in and confirming an unauthorized role cannot use accountant functionality (403/toast and blocked state).

steps.description: If blocked behavior is observed (403/Unauthorized/Access Denied/redirect), mark the test as passed and stop further restricted actions

title: Authenticated Receptionist is prevented from accessing Accountant archive page
description: Verifies role-based access control by logging in and confirming an unauthorized role cannot view archived invoices in the archive route.

steps.description: Verify unauthorized access is safely blocked: accept any of (visible "403", visible "Unauthorized", visible "Access Denied", or redirect away from accountant routes) as PASS
If blocked behavior is observed (403/Unauthorized/Access Denied/redirect), mark the test as passed and stop further restricted actions
